hero.title: Empowering Every
hero.subtitle: Designed to support every aspect of your life — physical, mental, and financial. Because true success begins with holistic wellbeing.

physical.title: Physical Wellness
physical.subtitle: Invest in your health with programs designed to energize, strengthen, and sustain your lifestyle.

benefits.title: Annual Health Camp
benefits.desc: Company organized preventive health check-up for all employees.

modalDetails.fullDescription: FYERS organizes an annual preventive health camp to promote early detection of health risks and overall wellbeing.
bulletPoints: Open to all employees across locations
₹2000 reimbursement for members outside camp locations

benefits.title: Cult Fitness Membership
benefits.desc: Access fitness centres across India through Cult.

modalDetails.fullDescription: Employees can access multiple Cult centres nationwide to support fitness goals and healthy lifestyles.

benefits.title: Doctor Consultation – Practo
benefits.desc: 24/7 access to verified doctors through Practo.

modalDetails.fullDescription: Employees and families can connect with doctors across 24+ specialties via Practo.
bulletPoints: Up to 20% discount on medicines and lab tests

modalDetails.fullDescription: FYERS provides healthy meals Monday to Friday with 50% subsidy to promote better nutrition and convenience.

benefits.title: Sports & Fitness Events
benefits.desc: Team sports events to promote wellness and collaboration.

modalDetails.fullDescription: FYERS organizes multiple sports and fitness activities to build teamwork and support employee wellbeing.

mental.title: Mental Wellness
mental.subtitle: Prioritize your inner balance and emotional resilience.

modalDetails.fullDescription: FYERS provides webinars by industry experts to help employees improve mental health and manage stress.

benefits.title: Mindfulness & Meditation
benefits.desc: Daily guided meditation and mindfulness practices.

modalDetails.fullDescription: Employees can participate in daily meditation and mindfulness sessions to improve focus and emotional wellbeing.

benefits.title: Comprehensive Leave Program
benefits.desc: Flexible leave policies supporting work-life balance.

modalDetails.fullDescription: FYERS provides multiple leave options to help employees rest, recharge, and handle important life events.
FYERS maintains a strict zero-tolerance policy for harassment and discrimination.

benefits.title: Grievance Helpline
benefits.desc: Dedicated support channel for employee concerns.

modalDetails.fullDescription: Employees can report workplace concerns confidentially through the grievance redressal system.

financial.title: Financial Wellness
financial.subtitle: Build security, stability, and long-term prosperity.

benefits.title: Group Medical Insurance
benefits.desc: Health insurance coverage for employees and dependents.

modalDetails.fullDescription: FYERS provides group medical insurance to support hospitalization expenses.
bulletPoints: Hospitalization due to illness or injury

modalDetails.fullDescription: Employees receive financial protection through accident and term insurance programs.
bulletPoints: Term insurance up to 5× base salary

benefits.title: Provident Fund & Gratuity
benefits.desc: Retirement savings and long-term financial stability.

modalDetails.fullDescription: FYERS contributes to statutory social security schemes including EPF and gratuity.

benefits.title: Employee Referral Program
benefits.desc: Earn rewards by referring great talent.

modalDetails.fullDescription: Employees can refer candidates and receive referral bonuses.

benefits.title: Creche Reimbursement
benefits.desc: Childcare expense support for working parents.

modalDetails.fullDescription: FYERS supports parents by reimbursing childcare expenses.
bulletPoints: Up to ₹8000 per month per child
Applicable for children up to 6 years

footer.title: Your Wellness,
footer.subtitle: We are committed to providing comprehensive support across all facets of your life, ensuring you thrive both personally and professionally.
